1→"""Minimal stdlib HTTP server for the convx web dashboard."""
     2→
     3→from __future__ import annotations
     4→
     5→import json
     6→import mimetypes
     7→import socket
     8→import urllib.parse
     9→from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, ThreadingHTTPServer
    10→from pathlib import Path
    11→from typing import Any
    12→
    13→
    14→class ConvxHandler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    15→    repo: Path  # set on the class by ConvxServer
    16→
    17→    def log_message(self, format: str, *args: Any) -> None:  # noqa: A002
    18→        pass  # suppress default request logging
    19→
    20→    def send_json(self, data: Any, status: int = 200) -> None:
    21→        body = json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8")
    22→        self.send_response(status)
    23→        self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
    24→        self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(body)))
    25→        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
    26→        self.end_headers()
    27→        self.wfile.write(body)
    28→
    29→    def send_text(self, text: str, content_type: str = "text/plain; charset=utf-8", status: int = 200) -> None:
    30→        body = text.encode("utf-8")
    31→        self.send_response(status)
    32→        self.send_header("Content-Type", content_type)
    33→        self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(body)))
    34→        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
    35→        self.end_headers()
    36→        self.wfile.write(body)
    37→
    38→    def do_OPTIONS(self) -> None:  # noqa: N802
    39→        self.send_response(204)
    40→        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
    41→        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, OPTIONS")
    42→        self.end_headers()
    43→
    44→    def do_GET(self) -> None:  # noqa: N802
    45→        parsed = urllib.parse.urlparse(self.path)
    46→        path = parsed.path
    47→        query = urllib.parse.parse_qs(parsed.query)
    48→
    49→        if path == "/api/sessions":
    50→            self._handle_sessions()
    51→        elif path.startswith("/api/sessions/") and path.endswith("/content"):
    52→            raw_key = path[len("/api/sessions/"):-len("/content")]
    53→            key = urllib.parse.unquote(raw_key)
    54→            self._handle_session_content(key)
    55→        elif path.startswith("/api/sessions/") and path.endswith("/json"):
    56→            raw_key = path[len("/api/sessions/"):-len("/json")]
    57→            key = urllib.parse.unquote(raw_key)
    58→            self._handle_session_json(key)
    59→        elif path == "/api/search":
    60→            q = query.get("q", [""])[0]
    61→            self._handle_search(q)
    62→        elif path == "/api/stats":
    63→            self._handle_stats()
    64→        else:
    65→            self._handle_static(path)
    66→
    67→    def _handle_sessions(self) -> None:
    68→        from convx_ai.search import list_sessions
    69→
    70→        sessions = list_sessions(self.repo)
    71→        self.send_json(sessions)
    72→
    73→    def _handle_session_content(self, key: str) -> None:
    74→        index_path = self.repo / ".convx" / "index.json"
    75→        if not index_path.exists():
    76→            self.send_json({"error": "Index not found"}, 404)
    77→            return
    78→        try:
    79→            index_data = json.loads(index_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    80→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
    81→            self.send_json({"error": "Failed to read index"}, 500)
    82→            return
    83→
    84→        record = index_data.get("sessions", {}).get(key)
    85→        if not record:
    86→            self.send_json({"error": "Session not found"}, 404)
    87→            return
    88→
    89→        md_rel = record.get("markdown_path")
    90→        if not md_rel:
    91→            self.send_json({"error": "No markdown path in record"}, 404)
    92→            return
    93→
    94→        md_path = self.repo / md_rel
    95→        if not md_path.exists():
    96→            self.send_json({"error": "Markdown file not found"}, 404)
    97→            return
    98→
    99→        try:
   100→            content = md_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   101→        except OSError:
   102→            self.send_json({"error": "Failed to read file"}, 500)
   103→            return
   104→
   105→        self.send_text(content, content_type="text/markdown; charset=utf-8")
   106→
   107→    def _handle_session_json(self, key: str) -> None:
   108→        index_path = self.repo / ".convx" / "index.json"
   109→        if not index_path.exists():
   110→            self.send_json({"error": "Index not found"}, 404)
   111→            return
   112→        try:
   113→            index_data = json.loads(index_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   114→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
   115→            self.send_json({"error": "Failed to read index"}, 500)
   116→            return
   117→
   118→        record = index_data.get("sessions", {}).get(key)
   119→        if not record:
   120→            self.send_json({"error": "Session not found"}, 404)
   121→            return
   122→
   123→        json_rel = record.get("json_path")
   124→        if not json_rel:
   125→            self.send_json({"error": "No json path in record"}, 404)
   126→            return
   127→
   128→        json_path = self.repo / json_rel
   129→        if not json_path.exists():
   130→            self.send_json({"error": "JSON file not found"}, 404)
   131→            return
   132→
   133→        try:
   134→            data = json.loads(json_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   135→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
   136→            self.send_json({"error": "Failed to read JSON"}, 500)
   137→            return
   138→
   139→        self.send_json(data)
   140→
   141→    def _handle_search(self, q: str) -> None:
   142→        if not q.strip():
   143→            self.send_json([])
   144→            return
   145→        try:
   146→            from convx_ai.search import query_index
   147→
   148→            results = query_index(self.repo, q)
   149→            self.send_json(results)
   150→        except Exception:
   151→            self.send_json([])
   152→
   153→    def _handle_stats(self) -> None:
   154→        try:
   155→            from convx_ai.stats import compute_stats_series
   156→
   157→            history_path = self.repo / "history"
   158→            if not history_path.exists():
   159→                self.send_json({
   160→                    "word": {"dates": [], "projects": [], "series": {}},
   161→                    "tool": {"dates": [], "projects": [], "series": {}},
   162→                    "by_source": {"dates": [], "projects": [], "series": {}},
   163→                })
   164→                return
   165→            data = compute_stats_series(history_path)
   166→            self.send_json(data)
   167→        except Exception as exc:
   168→            self.send_json({"error": str(exc)}, 500)
   169→
   170→    def _handle_static(self, path: str) -> None:
   171→        rel = path.lstrip("/") or "index.html"
   172→        try:
   173→            from importlib.resources import files
   174→
   175→            web_pkg = files("convx_ai.web")
   176→            parts = [p for p in rel.split("/") if p and p not in (".", "..")]
   177→            resource = web_pkg
   178→            for part in parts:
   179→                resource = resource.joinpath(part)  # type: ignore[assignment]
   180→            body = resource.read_bytes()
   181→            content_type, _ = mimetypes.guess_type(rel)
   182→            if content_type is None:
   183→                content_type = "application/octet-stream"
   184→        except Exception:
   185→            # SPA fallback: serve index.html for unknown routes
   186→            try:
   187→                from importlib.resources import files
   188→
   189→                body = files("convx_ai.web").joinpath("index.html").read_bytes()  # type: ignore[assignment]
   190→                content_type = "text/html; charset=utf-8"
   191→            except Exception:
   192→                self.send_error(404, "Not found")
   193→                return
   194→
   195→        self.send_response(200)
   196→        self.send_header("Content-Type", content_type)
   197→        self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(body)))
   198→        self.end_headers()
   199→        self.wfile.write(body)
   200→
   201→
   202→def find_free_port() -> int:
   203→    with socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM) as s:
   204→        s.bind(("127.0.0.1", 0))
   205→        return s.getsockname()[1]
   206→
   207→
   208→class ConvxServer:
   209→    def __init__(self, repo: Path, port: int = 0) -> None:
   210→        self.repo = repo
   211→        # Bind handler class with repo attached
   212→        handler_class = type("BoundConvxHandler", (ConvxHandler,), {"repo": repo})
   213→        if port == 0:
   214→            port = find_free_port()
   215→        self.httpd = ThreadingHTTPServer(("127.0.0.1", port), handler_class)
   216→        self.port: int = self.httpd.server_address[1]
   217→
   218→    def serve_forever_in_thread(self) -> None:
   219→        import threading
   220→
   221→        t = threading.Thread(target=self.httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
   222→        t.start()
   223→
   224→    def shutdown(self) -> None:
   225→        self.httpd.shutdown()
   226→

   428→        for project in result["projects"]
   429→    }
   430→    project_last_active = {
   431→        project: max(

   433→            default="-",
   434→        )
   435→        for project in result["projects"]
   436→    }
   437→
   438→    # Sort projects by total words descending
